description: Verify that a hazard analysis is conducted for each type of food.
input_data: Food safety plan and hazard analysis records.
expected_output: Hazard analysis is present and completed for the food.

description: Verify that the hazard analysis is documented.
input_data: Hazard analysis documentation from the facility.
expected_output: Hazard analysis exists in written or recorded form.

description: Verify that biological hazards are identified and considered.
expected_output: Biological hazards are identified and evaluated.

description: Verify that chemical hazards are identified and considered.
expected_output: Chemical hazards are identified and evaluated.

description: Verify that severity and probability of hazards are assessed.
input_data: Completed hazard evaluation section in safety plan.
expected_output: Severity and probability of hazards are documented.
